---
title: "2015896 - GEOMATICA BASICA"
subtitle: "Academic Year: 2026"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-important collapse=false}
## 📢 Homework

(05/06/2026)

- Write and publish [this notebook](https://rpubs.com/ials2un/sentinel2_ts)

:::

::: {.callout-important collapse=true}
## 📢 Syllabus

(02/02/2026)

- [🗓️ Know the syllabus here!](/2026/syllabus.qmd)

:::

# 🧑🏻‍🏫 Our Team

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Course Convenor


![](../figures/people/ials.png){fig-align="left" fig-alt="Photo of IVAN LIZARAZO" style="object-fit: cover;width:6em;height:6em;border-radius: 50%;"}  
**IVAN LIZARAZO** <br/>
_ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR_ <br/>
[UNAL](#)</a><br/>
📧 [ializarazos@unal.edu.co](mailto:)

Office Hours: 

- When: Thursdays 11:00 am 
- Where: Oficina 333
- How to book: via e-mail

## Teaching Staff

**IALS**


:::

# 📍 Dates - Location

Wednesdays 9am-11am at SALON 103
